question_text: Suppose that 𝑈 and 𝑉 are two independent and identically distributed random variables each having probability density function 𝑓(𝑥) = { 𝜆2𝑥 𝑒−𝜆𝑥 𝑖𝑓 𝑥> 0 0 𝑜𝑡ℎ𝑒𝑟𝑤𝑖𝑠𝑒, where 𝜆> 0. Which of the following statements is/are true?

options.A: The distribution of 𝑈−𝑉 is symmetric about 0
options.B: The distribution of 𝑈𝑉 does not depend on 𝜆
options.C: The distribution of 𝑉 does not depend on 𝜆
options.D: The distribution of 𝑉 is symmetric about 1
